turns.user_message: I tried to take a walk to clear my head, but it didn't help. I still feel just as heavy and stuck.
I keep trying little things to shake this feeling, but nothing works. The fog just settles deeper every day.
I can't even muster the energy to try feeling better anymore. I'm just completely drained and empty inside.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better.
